title: In Two Minds
text:
On one hand I am sad that I wasn’t able to profit from being early, and believing in AI  and the Singularity before most people did. I now have to come to terms with the fact that I will just be one goyim out of 7 billion once the Exponential gets going. 

On the other hand I realize that there is very little that I could have done under my constraints. Becoming an AI researcher before AI did better research than me was impossible. I didn’t know enough about AI back then to properly invest. Even 10xing what little capital I had wouldn’t have changed my life.  If I was born 10 years earlier I could have been someone, but alas I wasn’t.

In my current situation, I actually need the Singularity to happen soon or my I am cooked. But sadly, I will just be watching, not participating.
